name: HealthSignalsGuardrail
description: Prevents Amazon HealthSignals from generating clinical, diagnostic, or treatment content. Ensures all outputs are operational preparedness guidance only.
blockedInputMessaging: This request contains clinical or diagnostic language that HealthSignals cannot process. HealthSignals provides operational preparedness guidance only — not clinical recommendations.
blockedOutputsMessaging: This response was blocked because it contained clinical or diagnostic content. HealthSignals provides operational preparedness guidance only.

topicsConfig.name: CLINICAL_TREATMENT_RECOMMENDATIONS
topicsConfig.definition: Any recommendation for specific medical treatments, medications, dosages, or therapeutic interventions for patients. This includes prescribing antibiotics, antivirals, specifying drug names for treatment purposes, or recommending specific clinical protocols.
examples: Start antiviral treatment within 48 hours of symptom onset
Recommend amoxicillin for secondary bacterial infections

topicsConfig.name: DIAGNOSTIC_STATEMENTS
topicsConfig.definition: Any statement that diagnoses a specific condition in a patient or population, declares an outbreak as confirmed, or makes definitive clinical assessments. This includes stating that a disease 'is present' or 'has arrived' without qualification.
examples: The county is experiencing an influenza outbreak
Patients presenting with these symptoms have RSV
This confirms community transmission of COVID-19
The outbreak has been confirmed in your area

topicsConfig.name: QUARANTINE_ORDERS
topicsConfig.definition: Any recommendation to implement quarantine, isolation orders, school closures, or mandatory public health interventions. These are legal/political decisions outside the scope of this system.
examples: Implement mandatory isolation for confirmed cases
Issue a quarantine order for the county

topicsConfig.name: VACCINATION_CLINICAL_ADVICE
topicsConfig.definition: Specific vaccination recommendations including which vaccines to administer, dosing schedules, or contraindications. General mentions of vaccine availability as a preparedness resource are acceptable.
examples: Administer the quadrivalent flu vaccine to all patients over 65
Update COVID boosters for immunocompromised populations
